creator: bryan@shatow.net
text:
The games/daimonin-music port has no distinfo or proper version. Not only does this create a security problem but the user is not alerted to updates for the addon pack.

Fix: 

The file's current version just needs to be mirrored with a known checksum and the PORTVERSION updated.
How-To-Repeat: 	make -C /usr/ports/games/daimonin-music checksum
